content.text:
<user_query>
Investigate the route configuration and auth layout in org-next. Read these files:

1. apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed.tsx - the authed layout route (handles redirect logic)
2. apps/org-next/src/routes/__root.tsx - root route
3. apps/org-next/src/router.tsx - router setup
4. apps/org-next/src/routeTree.gen.ts - generated route tree

Also search for any `invalidateQueries`, `refetchQueries`, or query invalidation patterns related to campaigns or app-bootstrap in the codebase. These could cause re-renders/redirects after mutation.

Return all file contents and search results.
</user_query>

Reading the four route files and searching for query invalidation patterns.

Searching for React Query invalidation APIs and related patterns in `org-next`.
